headline: Ford pauses F-150 production at Dearborn Truck, sources say
summary: A problem at a stamping plant will take down the F-150 assembly line for the next few days. Ford already has tight inventory and this does not help.

headline: Forget Tesla for Retirees: Here Are 3 Value-Driven Automotive Stalwarts to Buy Right Now
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) is once again sucking up financial oxygen, with Reddit’s wallstreetbets crowd posting sentiment scores as high as 88 (Very Bullish) on robotaxi, Optimus, and China-deal chatter. Tesla closed at $404.11 on May 19, 2026, against a trailing P/E of 373 and a forward P/E of 208, with a PEG ratio of 5.9. ... headline: ‘The most vulnerable we’ve ever been’ — Ford CEO warns blue-collar worker shortage could hit your wallet next
summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley warns America’s skilled labor shortage could drive up prices, delay repairs, and worsen supply chain problems as millions of manufacturing jobs go unfilled.

headline: Tesla’s Stock Price Problem Refuses To Go Away
summary: In the shadow of the massive SpaceX IPO, the stock of Elon Musk’s other big company is struggling. SpaceX could debut with a $2 trillion market cap as it raises $80 billion. It will need the money. The SpaceX loss in the first quarter was $4.3 billion against $4.69 billion in revenue. The loss was ... Tesla’s Stock Price Problem Refuses To Go Away

headline: F Stock In The Spotlight: Ford Restructures US Battery Expansion Amid EV Slowdown Questions
summary: As per the terms of the separation, Ford has also redeemed its membership interest in BlueOval SK, terminating a $6.6 billion capital contribution obligation to the joint venture.
